classification.typology_description: Direct recipient of stolen funds — high transaction velocity on a newly opened account with rapid outbound transfers.

behavioural_indicators.label: Dormancy Signal
behavioural_indicators.description: Low account tenure / dormancy-break signal. Mule median 41 vs legit 64.

behavioural_indicators.label: Activity Flag
behavioural_indicators.description: Elevated transactional activity. Mules score ~22% higher (0.72 vs 0.59).

behavioural_indicators.label: Legitimacy Gap
behavioural_indicators.description: Missing legitimacy indicator. Every confirmed mule has F2082 = 0.

behavioural_indicators.label: Missingness Pattern
behavioural_indicators.description: Activity-count field absent. 82.7% of mules missing it vs 64% of legit.

behavioural_indicators.label: High-Risk Flag
behavioural_indicators.description: F670 = 1 carries a 2.29% mule rate (2.6x the population average).

behavioural_indicators.label: Risk Score
behavioural_indicators.description: Normalised transaction risk score derived from F115.

ai_report:
EXECUTIVE SUMMARY

The Alpha-001 account has been identified as a Critical risk due to its high Risk score (87.0/100) and Model risk probability of 0.9910. The SHAP fraud indicators suggest that the account exhibits several red flags, including High-Risk Flag (F670), Account Tenure (F2956), Legitimacy Indicator (F2082), and Transaction Risk Score (F115). These indicators collectively increase the likelihood of fraudulent activity.

RISK ASSESSMENT

The risk assessment for Alpha-001 is based on a combination of structured analysis and machine learning models. The account's high transaction velocity, newly opened status, High-Risk Flag, and missing Legitimacy Indicator all contribute to its elevated Risk score. This suggests that the account may be used for fraudulent purposes.

KEY FRAUD INDICATORS

The following SHAP fraud indicators are present in Alpha-001:

• High-Risk Flag (F670): +0.340
• Account Tenure (F2956): +0.280
• Legitimacy Indicator (F2082): +0.220
• Account Standing Period (F3889): +0.160
• Transaction Risk Score (F115): +0.130

These indicators collectively increase the risk of fraudulent activity.

MULE TYPOLOGY ASSESSMENT

The account typology evidence suggests that Alpha-001 is a Layer_1_Mule with a confidence level of 91%. The matched typology evidence includes:

• High transaction velocity
• Newly opened account
• High-Risk Flag set
• Missing Legitimacy Indicator

This typology evidence supports the risk assessment and highlights potential red flags.

ACCOUNT PROFILE ANALYSIS

The account holder's profile is as follows:

• Occupation: student
• Account standing period: L365D
• Account holder age: 23.0
• Account tenure: 28.0

While the occupation and account standing period are consistent with legitimate activity, the newly opened status and short account tenure raise concerns.

RECOMMENDED ACTIONS

Based on the risk assessment and typology evidence, we recommend:

1. Immediate review of all transactions by the compliance team.
2. Verification of the account holder's identity and legitimacy.
3. Monitoring of transaction velocity and account activity for signs of suspicious behavior.

REGULATORY NOTE

This report is subject to the Bank of India's Anti-Money Laundering (AML) and Combating the Financing of Terrorism (CFT) regulations. The compliance team must ensure that all recommended actions are taken in accordance with these regulations.
